title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) female genital ovary and/or fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma pathological N category
description: A pathological regional lymph node stage (pN) of a ovary, falliopian and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
